title: Tech industry grapples with Trump’s AI about-faces
description: Silicon Valley billionaires backed Trump due to fears that Democrats would overregulate AI. Now the White House is restricting the release of new AI models — and tech lobbyists are cautiously searching for answers.

title: Miivo AI CEO on the future of AI-native businesses - ICYMI
description: Miivo AI (TSX-V:MIVO) CEO Alex Damouni talked with Proactive about the company's evolution into Miivo AI (TSX-V:MIVO) and its vision for helping businesses improve productivity through artificial intelligence. Damouni explained that the company was founded with a mission to improve business...

title: South Korea’s Stock Market KOSPI Just Flashed a Global AI Warning
description: South Korea's stock market index, the KOSPI, triggered its second circuit breaker in a single week amid the AI chip trade, rattling global markets. Friday's 8.19% intraday plunge forced another 20-minute halt and dragged Wall Street, Tokyo, and Tokyo-listed SoftBank sharply lower. The cascade is...

title: QCOM Stock Eyes Worst Month In 7 Years: Analyst Says MSFT, GOOG May Be Behind Qualcomm’s AI Momentum
description: Shares of Qualcomm, Inc. (QCOM) are poised to post their worst monthly run in years, but an analyst’s bull case suggests that the company’s AI data-center ambitions may already be gaining support from major cloud customers. QCOM stock has declined 18% so far this month, on track for its weakest...

title: Gen Z’s hiring hell is real: 1 in 3 employers admit they’re replacing entry-level roles with AI
description: For Gen Z, the job market has looked more resilient than many feared. The unemployment rate hasn’t skyrocketed, and some of the bleakest predictions about AI wiping out entry-level jobs—including warnings from Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman—have been tempered by a labor...
